checklistAnswers.question: Is Health-club/Organizational Membership currently approved in the budget?
Does the membership provide opportunity for community inclusion?
Does the membership accommodate the individual's health and/or safety needs?
Does the membership increase independence or substitute for human assistance?
Is the membership provided exclusively toward the benefit of the participant? (not family)
Is the organization open to the public and not a private/invitation-only club?

parsed.formTitle: Health Club / Organizational Memberships Pre-approval Checklist
parsed.justification: Rivka will increase physical activity and community inclusion through a public gym membership.
parsed.valuedOutcome: Rivka will increase physical activity and community inclusion through a public gym membership.

webChecks.label: Organization is open to the public (not private/invitation-only)
webChecks.criteria: Anyone from the general public must be able to join (public 'join'/'sign up' flow, published membership tiers). Private or invitation-only clubs fail.

webChecks.label: Membership fee is published
webChecks.criteria: A concrete membership price (monthly or yearly) must be publicly visible.

webChecks.label: Published membership fee matches the form (yearly/monthly)
webChecks.criteria: Compare the membership fee on the application against the published amount, being careful about monthly vs yearly. Verdict: matches application exactly / differs / not published.

findings.note: The website clearly presents membership options (Classic and PF Black Card®) with "Join Now" buttons, indicating it is open to the public.
findings.label: Organization is open to the public (not private/invitation-only)

findings.note: The website explicitly states that Classic memberships begin at $15, billed monthly.
findings.quote: *Classic memberships begin at $15 and PF Black Card® memberships begin at $24.99, billed monthly.
findings.label: Membership fee is published

findings.note: The website states that Classic memberships begin at $15, billed monthly, which matches the $15.00 Monthly fee on the application.
findings.quote: *Classic memberships begin at $15 and PF Black Card® memberships begin at $24.99, billed monthly.
findings.label: Published membership fee matches the form (yearly/monthly)

rateComparison.note: The website states that Classic memberships begin at $15, billed monthly, which matches the $15.00 Monthly fee on the application form.

PF Black Card®
Classic
Compare
The Membership That Gets You All the Perks

Use of Any Planet Fitness Worldwide

As a PF Black Card® member, you’ll have the ability to use any of our 2,700+ locations.

Bring a Guest Anytime

Working out is better with a buddy. PF Black Card® members can bring a guest for free every visit!

PF+ Exclusive App Workouts

Unlock exclusive digital workout content, with access to our brand's premium subscription.

Free In-Club Fitness Training ¹

With our certified fitness trainers you can take a small group fitness class, learn about our extensive range of cardio and strength machines, or create a customized workout plan. It’s all free!

Premium Perks: Partner Rewards & Discounts

Making fitness even more rewarding. PF Black Card® Members get even more exclusive discounts and special offers.

50% Off Select Drinks

PF Black Card® members get special pricing that makes it easier to opt for healthy beverages.

Free WiFi

Enjoy free WiFi at Planet Fitness. Just ask for the WiFi password at the front desk.
Join PF Black Card®
FREE ACCESS TO THE
BLACK CARD SPA®
Relax and Unwind After Your Workout

Use of Massage Chairs

With a PF Black Card® membership, you can relax and unwind with a massage after your workout (or before – we don’t judge).

Use of HydroMassage® ¹

HydroMassage® is an innovative water massage for wellness and muscle recovery. Powerful waves of heated water massage target specific areas for a personalized and relaxing experience.

Use of Tanning ¹

An exclusive benefit for PF Black Card® members.

Use of Total Body Enhancement ¹

This booth features a UV free application of red light, which pairs with vibra-shape technology.

Use Of Wellness Pod ¹

A relaxing and rejuvenating escape awaits in the Wellness Pod! Personalize your session by choosing your visual, audio, temperature and scent preferences.

Use of Recovery Lounge ¹

The Recovery Lounge offers targeted cold for soreness and aches, complemented by warmth in other areas for comfort. This balanced approach ensures a holistic and refreshing recovery, ideal post-workout.
Join PF Black Card®
CLASSIC
Get High-Quality Fitness at an Affordable Price

Unlimited Access to Home Club

Come in anytime, as often as you like.

PF App Workouts

Check out the FREE PF App for tons of on-demand workouts for all fitness levels and styles.

Free In-Club Fitness Training ¹

With our certified fitness trainers you can take a small group fitness class, learn about our extensive range of cardio and strength machines, or create a customized workout plan. It’s all free!

Free WiFi

Enjoy free WiFi at Planet Fitness. Just ask for the WiFi password at the front desk.

Making fitness even more rewarding. Members get exclusive discounts and special offers.

Find a Club Near You
Find a Club
Memberships FAQs

What’s the difference between PF Black Card® and Classic memberships?

Planet Fitness offers two membership options: PF Black Card® and Classic. With a PF Black Card®, you will have access to all Planet Fitness clubs worldwide, while the Classic membership gives you access to your home club location. Additionally, as a PF Black Card® member you will have access to several amenities that are not available to Classic members such as the option to bring a guest anytime, access to the PF Black Card® Spa, and other exclusive PF Black Card® perks.

How old do I have to be to get a Planet Fitness membership?

You can join PF if you are 13 years or older with a parent/legal guardian's permission. Members aged 13 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian when they work out. Many clubs also require that members aged 14 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian at all times. Members who are 15-17 years old (15-18 in regions where 19 is the age of majority) must have a signed waiver from a parent or guardian. For further questions or clarifications regarding age policy, reach out to your local club for more details.

Does Planet Fitness offer classes or personal training?

Yes. We offer free fitness training in small group formats that are first come, first serve. Fitness classes are led by certified fitness trainers and are available to all Planet Fitness members. All trainers must be employed by the club franchise location. Outside trainers are not allowed. Please see your home club for details.

Additionally, our PF App is equipped with tons of helpful routines from beginner-level workouts to advanced fitness training. Simply select "Workouts" at the bottom of the home tab to access dozens of training videos. Also, each of our machines is equipped with a unique QR code. Simply scan the QR scanner located at the top right corner of the Tutorials section of the PF App. You will immediately receive instruction on how to use the equipment!

What are my club's hours?

Please visit Gyms Near Me and click on "Club Details" to get more information on specific club details including club hours, class schedules, and more.

What does it mean if a membership has a commitment?

The Commitment length associated with your membership is the minimal number of months you will be billed. If you cancel before this time, you may be subject to a buyout fee. For No Commitment memberships, you may cancel at anytime without paying a fee.

Why do you need my checking account for a membership?

The method in which members are able to pay for their monthly membership varies by location, but many Planet Fitness clubs accept payment through checking accounts only. We require an Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT) through checking accounts for your convenience: This allows us to be able to continue your membership without interruption or the need to update your payment information if your credit card is lost, stolen, invalid, or expired.

How do I make changes to my membership?

You can make changes to your membership by contacting your home club or logging into your account online at My Account | Planet Fitness .

Have More Questions?

Items marked with a ¹ are available at participating locations only. See home club for details.

*Classic memberships begin at $15 and PF Black Card® memberships begin at $24.99, billed monthly. Memberships may include 12-month commitment. State and local taxes may apply. Subject to an annual fee of $49. Prices may vary depending on location. Services and perks subject to availability and restrictions. Must be at least 18 years old to enroll, or 13-17 with parent/guardian. State and local restrictions on tanning frequency with PF Black Card® memberships apply. Participating locations only. Locations independently owned and operated. See home club for details. We reserve the right to correct pricing errors or withdraw offer at any time.©2026 Planet Fitness Franchising LLC
